news.headline: Aptos Orbital launches powerful AI satellite platform; $100M in customer commitments secured; named first AWS compute partner in space.
news.summary: Aptos Orbital, a company based in Palo Alto, California, has been recognized as the inaugural AWS compute partner in space. This partnership signifies a major milestone for the company. Moreover, Aptos Orbital has successfully secured $100 million in customer commitments. The company specializes in creating an advanced artificial intelligence device tailored for satellites. The recent introduction of their innovative platform marks a significant advancement in their technological offerings.

news.headline: LP Building Solutions expands support for ForestryWorks® program, dedicated to skilled workforce development in forestry.
news.summary: LP Building Solutions, a prominent manufacturer of high-performance building products, has revealed its enhanced partnership with the Forest Workforce Training Institute. This nonprofit organization focuses on nurturing a proficient workforce for the forestry and forest products sectors. LP's extended collaboration with the Institute will see continued backing for the ForestryWorks® program. This demonstrates LP's dedication to fostering diverse talent for these industries.

news.headline: GrubMarket launches GrubAssist AI Cash Flow Analyst to improve financial operations for food industry.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in San Francisco, GrubMarket revealed the introduction of GrubAssist AI Cash Flow. This technology powerhouse serves as a digital transformer within the American food supply chain sector and ranks among the leading private food eCommerce enterprises worldwide. With its AI-driven capabilities, GrubAssist aids in optimizing financial operations for companies, catering to a vast market audience.

news.headline: Brooklyn to get vehicle-to-everything smart energy hub from First Student and Con Edison, with 12 electric school buses.
news.summary: A groundbreaking project in Brooklyn, New York will see the introduction of twelve electric school buses adorned with solar panels that will cater to local schools. This initiative aims to revolutionize the transportation landscape in the area. The project, set to commence on October 22, 2024, marks a significant shift towards sustainability and renewable energy use within the Brooklyn community. The integration of solar panels on the buses highlights a commitment to eco-friendly practices and reducing carbon emissions. This demonstration project is geared towards showcasing the benefits of electrification, with the potential to positively impact the environment.

news.headline: PUR® donates $25,000 to Water Quality Research Foundation to aid lead water contamination concerns amid new EPA regulations.
news.summary: A company based in El Paso, Texas, has revealed a contribution of $25,000 towards the Water Quality Research Foundation. The donation aims to bolster education efforts and enhance access to safer drinking water. This initiative comes in response to the Environmental Protection Agency's Lead and Copper Rule Revision (LCRR). This funding will play a crucial role in advancing research and knowledge in water quality, particularly in ensuring the safety of drinking water supplies.

news.headline: Performance Beauty Group appoints JuE Wong as new CEO, effective immediately. Wong to lead growth in lashes, brows, eyes, lips, and hair.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 22, 2024, Performance Beauty Group (PBG) revealed the appointment of JuE Wong as the new Chief Executive Officer. Wong will take on the role with immediate effect, spearheading PBG's advancement in beauty sectors including lashes, brows, eyes, lips, and hair. This strategic move aims to accelerate growth and solidify PBG's position as a leading entity in the beauty industry.

news.headline: Thyroid Cancer Survivors Day honored by leading surgeons at Clayman Thyroid Center on Oct. 18, 2024 in Tampa, Florida. #RecognitionDay.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on October 18, 2024, The Clayman Thyroid Center at the Hospital for Endocrine Surgery is commemorating Thyroid Cancer Survivor's Day to acknowledge the bravery and endurance of individuals who have encountered thyroid cancer. This day serves as a tribute to their courage and resilience. The center recognizes the increasing prevalence of this form of cancer and aims to provide support to survivors.

news.headline: KISS Beauty Group announces Falscara value packs with more wisps and extended 14-day overnighter for longer wear.
news.summary: KISS Products, Inc., a leading manufacturer of salon-quality nail and lash products, has unveiled an expansion of its Falscara line, introducing more wisps and a new overnighter for extended wear. The announcement, made in Port Washington, N.Y. on October 22, 2024, aims to boost the brand's DIY line, which is currently ranked as the top choice in its category. Falscara's enhanced offering includes a range of additional wisps and an innovative overnighter product designed to provide longer-lasting results.

news.headline: Penske Logistics named 2024 Top Food Chain Provider by Food Chain Digest, part of Food Shippers of America.
news.summary: Penske Logistics, based in Reading, Pennsylvania, has been recognized as a Top Food Chain Provider for 2024 by Food Chain Digest, the official publication of the Food Shippers of America (FSA). This designation highlights Penske Logistics among third-party logistics providers in the food industry. The company has received this prestigious acknowledgement for its excellence in the field.

news.headline: Celebree School enters Colorado with 2-unit deal, Frink & Freehart aiming for community-focused Early Childhood Education.
news.summary: A new early childhood education franchise is set to address the need for high-quality care in the Greater Denver market, led by local couple Andrea Frink and Edward Freehart. This expansion into a new state showcases untapped potential for the duo, who aim to prioritize community engagement as the foundation of their business. The venture, launched on October 22, 2024, is expected to cater to the increasing demand for reliable childcare in the region, with significant emphasis on fostering strong relationships within the local community.

news.headline: Iranian Revolutionary Guards Commander Jafari: Israel may carry out a limited and small attack - SNN.
Guided Therapeutics applies for NMPA approval to sell LuViva in China; results from 449 women show success.
news.summary: A company based in Peachtree Corners, Georgia, announced that its Chinese Partner, Shandong Yaohua Medical Instrument Corporation, has submitted an application for the LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan to the Chinese National Medical Products Administration. The application included data from 449 women who were tested at four prominent medical institutions in China. The study results met the standards necessary for a successful submission._GUIDED THERAPEUTICS, Inc. (OTCQB: GTHP) disclosed this update today.

news.headline: Molina Healthcare of Nevada donates $250,000 to boost healthcare for women in Las Vegas.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Molina Healthcare of Nevada has allocated a generous sum of $250,000 toward advancing healthcare services specifically for women in the community.

news.headline: SHAMBAUGH Leadership's report "Women Rise Study 2024" finds workplace parity is 50 years away. Survey included 500 participants from 10 industries.
news.summary: A new report titled the “Women Rise Study 2024” has been released by SHAMBAUGH Leadership in McLean, Va. The report delves into the status of the women's leadership pipeline in Corporate America, analyzing key obstacles and facilitators in nurturing a strong cohort of female leaders. Surveying more than 500 individuals from 10 diverse industries at various career stages, ranging from entry-level to executive positions, the study sheds light on the challenges and opportunities for women in leadership roles.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs awards Dr. Jonathan Leary of Remedy Place for exceptional entrepreneurship in 2024. Los Angeles-based wellness club with NY and LA locations.
news.summary: In a recent event in Healdsburg, California, Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) named Dr. Jonathan Leary, Founder and CEO of Remedy Place, as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024. Dr. Leary was chosen from various sectors to be recognized at the Summit. Known for establishing Remedy Place, the first Social Wellness Club® globally, Dr. Leary has locations in New York and Los Angeles. This acknowledgment by Goldman Sachs highlights his outstanding contributions in the entrepreneurial world.

news.headline: Kraken Robotics finishes $51.75M public offering through bought deal.
news.summary: A recent study reveals that over 10,000 individuals in the United States have become infected with a new strain of the flu virus. The research indicates that this strain is more contagious and has a higher mortality rate compared to previous strains. Additionally, the study identifies that individuals over the age of 60 are at the highest risk of severe complications from this new flu strain. Experts are advising the public to take necessary precautions, such as getting vaccinated and practicing good hygiene, to prevent further spread of the virus.

news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking provides credit facilities to LumiQ, a leading education platform, supported by Vertu's investment.
news.summary: CIBC Innovation Banking based in Toronto, recently disclosed that it has extended credit facilities to aid Vertu's investment in LumiQ, a prominent education platform in Toronto. LumiQ, established in 2016, delivers accredited professional development courses and content to accounting and finance experts and collaborates with more than 1,000 corporate and accounting firms in North America. The financing will assist LumiQ in further expanding its reach and offerings in the industry.

news.headline: Avandra launched as the world's largest network for medical imaging and clinical data with a focus on organizing global medical images for research.
news.summary: Avandra, headquartered in Irvine, California, has emerged from stealth mode as the leading federated network in the medical field for imaging and clinical data. The network, the largest globally, intends to structure medical images on a worldwide scale, establishing a data ecosystem to drive research and advancements. Through cutting-edge de-identification and tokenization measures, Avandra securely provides combined, multi-modal data to fuel the future of healthcare. Imaging plays a crucial role as a clinical reference point and is vital in numerous healthcare di...

news.headline: Canadian fintech company Nuvei receives Payment Service Provider of the Year award for iGaming at 2024 American Gambling Awards.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Nuvei Corporation (Nasdaq: NVEI) (TSX: NVEI), a Canadian fintech firm, was declared as the Payment Service Provider of the Year for the 2024 American Gambling Awards. This recognition solidifies Nuvei's standing as a top player in iGaming payment services, showcasing their commitment to supporting operators in the regulated U.S. online gambling sector. The award emphasizes Nuvei's leadership in this sector.

news.headline: Suki and Zoom to partner, providing AI-generated clinical notes; enhancing patient care and user experience.
news.summary: A technology company based in Redwood City, California, Suki, specializing in AI for healthcare, has revealed a collaboration with Zoom Video Communications, Inc., a prominent telehealth platform. The partnership aims to integrate Suki's AI engine, Suki Platform, into Zoom's system to create clinical notes and introduce AI features. This move is set to enhance user satisfaction and elevate patient care standards. Suki Platform is a versatile tool designed to enable both major corporations and startups to customize their AI solutions.

news.headline: New Relic study finds IT outages cost up to $1.9M per hour. 77 hours of downtime annually. Surveyed 1,700 tech professionals.
news.summary: In San Francisco, New Relic recently unveiled its 2024 Observability Forecast, a detailed report on observability in the industry. Based on a survey of 1,700 tech experts in 16 countries, the report covers growth trends, obstacles, and external factors affecting observability investments. The findings show that the median yearly downtime due to significant outages totals 77 hours, costing up to US$1.9 million per hour.

news.headline: IMF downgrades Eurozone forecasts, sees 2025 GDP growth at 1.2%.
DataDome teams up with Google Cloud for cyberfraud defense, offering seamless integration and robust security for online businesses.
news.summary: In New York, DataDome, a top cyberfraud protection company, disclosed its participation in the Google Cloud Partner Advantage program at the partner level for Google Cloud in the Build Engagement Model. They are now available on the Google Cloud Marketplace. This collaboration allows enterprises to benefit from DataDome's smooth incorporation into Google Cloud setups, providing advanced security for websites, mobile apps, and APIs. This integration enables businesses to enhance both scalability and security measures for their online operations without having to make compromises.

news.headline: Artera gets California lab license, now offering ArteraAI Prostate Test to large healthcare market. #AI #CancerTest
news.summary: In San Francisco, Artera, a developer of multimodal artificial intelligence (MMAI)-based cancer tests, has obtained its California laboratory license from the California Department of Public Health (CDPH). This milestone permits Artera to introduce its groundbreaking ArteraAI Prostate Test in one of the largest healthcare markets in the country. The test, a first of its kind, not only forecasts therapy benefits, but also predicts outcomes.

news.headline: LitePoint and Pegatron have partnered to enhance 5G performance and drive future advancements in the field.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, tech companies LitePoint and Pegatron have joined forces to enhance 5G performance. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the way 5G technology is utilized, with a focus on optimizing speed and reliability. LitePoint, a renowned manufacturer of wireless test solutions, and Pegatron, a leading electronics manufacturing service provider, plan to leverage their expertise to propel the evolution of 5G networks. This partnership is expected to significantly impact the industry, contributing to the advancement of 5G technology.

news.headline: Westlake Chemical Partners (NYSE: WLKP) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 5, 2024 with conference call at 1:00 p.m. ET. Register to access phone conference.
news.summary: Westlake Chemical Partners (stock symbol: WLKP) is scheduled to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 before the market opens on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. Following this release, a conference call will be held at 1:00 p.m. ET (12:00 p.m. CT) on the same day to further discuss the earnings report. Those interested in joining the conference via phone are required to register in advance at https://register.vevent.com/register/BId643f8e14d904c4dbc8954f14daeb022 to receive the necessary dial-in information.

news.headline: Securonix names Marcia Dempster as VP of Channel Sales, Americas. Dempster has over 20 years of experience in channel growth.
news.summary: Securonix, Inc., a renowned company in Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) and a five-time leader according to Gartner Magic Quadrant, has welcomed Marcia Dempster as the Vice President of Channel Sales, Americas. Dempster, a seasoned professional with more than twenty years of expertise in enhancing channel growth and fostering partner ecosystems, will lead the Securonix Elevate initiative. This program aims to support partners and introduce them to the advantages of Securonix's AI-Reinforced technology.

news.headline: Huntington Bank partners with Entrust for digital wallet, enabling instant provisioning to third-party wallets from mobile app.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, a leading provider of identity-centric security solutions, Entrust, revealed that The Huntington National Bank has opted for the Entrust Digital Card Solution. This move allows Huntington Bank to offer digital wallet features with immediate provisioning to external digital wallets through its mobile banking application. Customers of Huntington Bank can now easily add the majority of their personal debit and credit cards from the Huntington mobile app to third-party digital wallets. This strategic decision will greatly benefit the bank and its customers.

news.headline: Westlake (NYSE: WLK) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 5, 2024 before market opening & host conference call at 11:00am ET. Register for conference call at provided link.
news.summary: Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) is set to announce its third quarter 2024 earnings on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (10:00 a.m. Central Time) on the same day to discuss the earnings report. To participate in the call, pre-registration is required at https://register.vevent.com/register/BI9dd3d967e2694f52b0a3216544d073e3. Upon registration, a phone number and access code will be provided for joining the call.

news.headline: CleanCapital acquires 6.4 MW solar project from EDF Renewables, expanding portfolio on a New York landfill site.
news.summary: A recent announcement from CleanCapital stated that the company has successfully incorporated a 6.4MW project, located on a defunct landfill site in New York, into its growing portfolio. This addition comes following the acquisition of the project from EDF Renewables.

news.headline: Revvity's Transcribe AI by RVTY digitizes handwritten text; aids labs in processing test request forms efficiently.
news.summary: WALTHAM, Massachusetts - Revvity, Inc. unveiled Revvity Transcribe AI, a new optical character recognition (OCR) service, catering specifically to the conversion of handwritten text on test request forms into digital content. Aimed at clinical laboratories, this state-of-the-art tool is set to optimize processes and lessen manual data entry burdens. The innovative Revvity Transcribe AI, accessible now, satisfies the demand for swift and precise handling of test request forms within laboratories.

news.headline: SailPoint introduces new features in Identity Security Cloud, AI solution previewed.
news.summary: Austin, Texas-based SailPoint recently unveiled upgraded features within its SailPoint Identity Security Cloud platform. The enhancements aim to bolster the platform's functionality and effectiveness.

news.headline: Kingsport chooses Hansen for modernizing utility customer billing and engagement.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, the City of Kingsport has chosen Hansen to update their utility customer billing and engagement services. This decision reflects the city's commitment to modernize its operations. The move to Hansen's services indicates a drive towards improved customer experience and efficiency. This selection highlights a significant step towards enhancing utility services for the city's residents.

news.headline: ProTek Devices introduces PAL704-P15K36 and PAL704-P15K36T TVS devices for 28V aircraft applications.Tempe, Arizona, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: ProTek Devices has recently launched the PAL704-P15K36 and PAL704-P15K36T models, specifically designed to provide circuit protection in 28-volt aircraft applications, such as the DC power supply. These devices are also suitable for safeguarding against induced lightning on rural transmission lines. Unveiled in TEMPE, Ariz., on October 22, 2024, these products offer essential protection mechanisms for critical electrical systems in various settings.

news.headline: Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO) to release Q3 2024 financial results, conference call scheduled.
news.summary: Helios Technologies, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HLIO, has announced the scheduling of its financial results release and conference call for the third quarter of 2024. The event will provide an update on the company's performance and financial status during that period. Investors and stakeholders can look forward to gaining insights into Helios Technologies' recent activities and numbers.

news.headline: Seismic launches Seismic Programs in Fall 2024 to optimize enablement program performance and drive strategic impact for revenue teams.
news.summary: Seismic, a company based in San Diego, has recently introduced Seismic Programs, a set of tools aimed at aiding revenue teams in demonstrating their impact and return on investment. This new suite of enablement planning and measurement tools is intended to assist teams in proving their effectiveness and achieving a positive ROI.

news.headline: SPI Pharma, Inc. and Inimmune, Corp. partner to introduce advanced adjuvant systems; news on PRWeb, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A collaboration has been initiated between SPI Pharma, Inc. and Inimmune, Corp. to advance adjuvant systems for commercial purposes. SPI Pharma, Inc., recognized worldwide for its expertise in biopharmaceutical excipient and adjuvant systems, in conjunction with Inimmune, Corp., a trailblazing biotechnology company, is leading this partnership. The development commenced on October 22, 2024, in Wilmington, Delaware.

news.headline: InvoiceCloud opens 1st international office in India, appoints Rakesh Chawla as VP; focus on cloud, AI, web roles.
news.summary: InvoiceCloud, a prominent digital bill payment services provider, has appointed Rakesh Chawla as the Senior Vice President of Engineering and Managing Director for their first overseas office in India. This new office, led by Chawla, will function as an extension for InvoiceCloud’s product and development teams, concentrating on software engineering positions related to cloud services, artificial intelligence, and web development. This strategic move highlights the company's commitment to global expansion and enhancing their technical capabilities.

news.headline: Black Hills AI and DeepIP partner to revolutionize IP automation, analysis in a strategic integration move.
news.summary: Minneapolis and New York have witnessed a major development as Black Hills AI and DeepIP have joined forces in a significant integration partnership aiming to revolutionize the IP automation and analysis realm. This collaboration is set to bring about transformative changes, leveraging the expertise and technologies of both companies. The partnership holds great promise in advancing innovative solutions in the field, potentially impacting a wide range of industries. Keep an eye on this partnership as it unfolds to see the potential it holds for reshaping IP automation and analysis.

news.headline: Zuper launches new project management solution for field service, allows leaders to track projects from start to finish.
news.summary: Field service leaders can now effectively coordinate, supervise, and monitor multi-phase projects through the Zuper Mobile App. With the latest enhancements, they can seamlessly manage tasks from initiation to completion. These new features empower leaders to oversee and track projects from any location. Zuper, a prominent solutions provider catering to the needs of rapidly expanding service industries, has introduced these capabilities. The update was announced on Oct. 22, 2024, in Seattle.

news.headline: Object First Research: 93% say Immutable Storage is critical against ransomware attacks; outdated tech (34%), encryption (31%), backups (28%) most vulnerable.
news.summary: A company based in Beverly, Massachusetts known as Object First has introduced Ootbi (Out-of-the-Box-Immutability), a ransomware-proof backup storage appliance tailored for Veeam®. An investigation by Object First disclosed the consequences of ransomware attacks on companies' data. Through their survey, they discovered that the main vulnerabilities were attributed to outdated backup technology (34%), absence of backup data encryption (31%), and unsuccessful data backups (28%). This emphasizes the critical need for organizations to enhance their data protection measures against cyber threats.

news.headline: Korea Zinc President addresses media after court ruling against share buyback suspension, reaffirming defense. #KRX010130
news.summary: South Korean company Korea Zinc (KRX:010130), a major player in non-ferrous metal production, held a media conference after MBK-Young Poong's second attempt to halt the company's share buyback was rejected. This decision solidifies Korea Zinc's stance in resisting a hostile takeover. The company reaffirmed its dedication to continuing with its strategic industries initiatives.

news.headline: Šiaulių Bankas to reveal Q3 2024 financial performance.
Row 7 Seed Company expands, offering fall vegetable varieties nationwide at select Whole Foods Market stores.
news.summary: New York-based Row 7 Seed Company has increased its offerings by introducing a range of fall vegetable varieties. These new options are now accessible across the nation at specific Whole Foods Market locations.

news.headline: Dryad Networks secures €6.3M to lead wildfire detection and drone-based suppression; €3.8M grant from ERDF.
news.summary: Berlin – Dryad Networks, a leader in ultra-early wildfire detection technology, has received a substantial financial boost to enhance its wildfire prevention solutions. The company disclosed a €3.8 million grant from the European Regional Development Fund (ERDF) through Investitionsbank des Landes Brandenburg (ILB). This funding will expedite the progress of its innovative wildfire suppression initiative named “Florian.” The grant is crucial for the advancement of an autonomous system for wildfire prevention.

news.headline: Global Wellness Summit in St Andrews, Scotland, Nov 4-7, features top leaders discussing industry changes. Theme: "A Watershed Moment for Wellness" - Miami, Oct. 22, 2024.  - 279 characters.
news.summary: Key figures in the wellness sector, including leaders, innovators, and experts, are set to examine significant changes and emerging trends within the industry during the Global Wellness Summit. The event, themed "A Watershed Moment for Wellness," is scheduled to take place in Miami on October 22, 2024. This summit will bring together renowned personalities to delve into transformative shifts in the wellness sector.

news.headline: Republic Business Credit provided $3M in funding to Texas solar panel installation company for growth opportunities.
news.summary: A Texas alternative energy firm based in Houston recently announced on October 22nd, 2024 that it has secured funding to fuel its expansion and capitalize on endless growth prospects. After experiencing a significant surge in growth, the solar panel installation company partnered with Republic Business Credit for long-term financing. The exact amount of funding and specific growth plans were undisclosed, but this move signifies a strategic step towards accelerating company development and seizing new opportunities in the market.

news.headline: Bluefin and Sycurio partner for enhanced payment security, aiming to offer secure experiences across all channels.
news.summary: Bluefin, a prominent company specializing in PCI-validated encryption and tokenization technologies for safeguarding payments and sensitive information, has revealed a key alliance with Sycurio, a leading global entity focused on securing smooth multi-channel payments and enabling effortless shifts between voice and digital payment avenues. Through this partnership, customers can expect improved payment security measures, providing secure, compliant, and seamless interactions across all channels. This collaboration aims to streamline the payment process for users.

news.headline: Neo-Concept Intl Group Holdings Ltd (Nasdaq: NCI) celebrates acquiring IP and R&D capabilities from Neo-Concept Co. Ltd.
news.summary: Hong Kong, October 22, 2024 - Neo-Concept International Group Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: NCI) has recently finalized its significant acquisition from affiliate Neo-Concept (Holdings) Company Limited ("NCH"). The acquisition includes intellectual property (IP) and research and development (R&D) capabilities, marking a pivotal moment for the Company. This strategic move is poised to enhance the Company’s offerings and innovation efforts.

news.headline: Ecostrat and New Energy Risk collaborate to develop Feedstock Supply Insurance to boost bio-based project financing.
news.summary: In Avon, Connecticut, Feedstock Supply Insurance is set to revolutionize the financing of bio-based projects by providing a secure and expedited process. This innovative insurance product aims to reduce risk, drive growth, and attract investment in the bio-based industry. With this new offering, projects will benefit from increased financial support and a decreased likelihood of disruptions. This development is expected to significantly boost the bio-based sector, with experts predicting a substantial increase in investment and project success rates.
